svg.title: Order service data flow from client to database
svg.desc: A flowchart showing data moving from HTTP client through Controller, Service, Repository layers, then into the database, with DTOs and entities labeled at each transformation step.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the HTTP request look like for placing an order?')
sendPrompt('What does the OrderController look like in Spring Boot?')
sendPrompt('What does the OrderService mapToDto method do exactly?')
g.text: creates Order entity, sets order number

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a DTO and why do we use it?')
sendPrompt('What annotations does an entity class need in Spring Boot?')
sendPrompt('What does the OrderRepository interface look like using JpaRepository?')
sendPrompt('What do the orders and order_line_items tables look like?')

svg.text: Click any box to learn more
